/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kokoro_tts.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/kokoro_tts.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kokoro_tts.dir/src/kokoro/kokoro_tts.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kokoro_tts.dir/src/misaki/tokenizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kokoro_tts.dir/src/misaki/text_normalizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kokoro_tts.dir/src/misaki/cmudict.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kokoro_tts.dir/src/misaki/g2p.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kokoro_tts.dir/src/audio/wav_writer.cpp.o -o kokoro_tts   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/home/user/Desktop/kokoro/libtorch/lib:/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64 /home/user/Desktop/kokoro/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so /home/user/Desktop/kokoro/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /home/user/Desktop/kokoro/libtorch/lib/libcudart.so.12 /home/user/Desktop/kokoro/libtorch/lib/libcupti.so.12 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libespeak-ng.so
